abilities.name: sturdy
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents being KOed from full HP, leaving 1 HP instead. Protects against the one-hit KO moves regardless of HP.
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon is at full HP, any hit that would knock it out will instead leave it with 1 HP. Regardless of its current HP, it is also immune to the one-hit KO moves: Fissure, Guillotine, Horn Drill, and Sheer Cold. If this Pokémon is holding a Focus Sash, this ability takes precedence and the item will not be consumed.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon cannot be knocked out by a single hit as long as its HP is full. One-hit KO moves will also fail to knock it out.

abilities.name: rock-head
abilities.effect: This Pokémon does not receive recoil damage from its recoil moves. Struggle's recoil is unaffected. This ability does not prevent crash damage from missing with Jump Kick or High Jump Kick.
abilities.flavorText: Protects the Pokémon from recoil damage.

abilities.name: rattled
abilities.shortEffect: Raises Speed one stage upon being hit by a Dark, Ghost, or Bug move.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's Speed rises one stage with each hit from a damaging Dark-, Ghost-, or Bug-type move.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon gets scared when hit by a Dark-, Ghost-, or Bug-type attack or if intimidated, which boosts its Speed stat.
